summary: Phase 4 (bulk-delete + bulk-priority + dynamic form schema) tested end-to-end. Backend: 15/15 pytest passing in /app/backend/tests/test_phase4.py — TestBulkDelete (5 tests: empty→422, operator→403, success+cascade with GET-404 on all deleted ids, audit_log entry 'bulk_delete', nonexistent ids returns deleted=0); TestBulkPriority (5 tests: empty→422, invalid prioritas→422, operator→403, success with updated count + activity meta.bulk=true + audit 'bulk_priority', already-target skip returns updated=0); TestLayananFormSchema (3 tests: all layanan have form_schema key, 'Approval Pengajuan Mutasi Guru' has all 15 expected keys with diangkat_sebagai=select[Guru,Tenaga Kependidikan], FormField shape valid); TestLayananCRUDSchema (1 test: create + update layanan persists form_schema add/modify); TestTicketFormData (1 test: POST /tickets with form_data persists and GET returns it). Frontend (Playwright on production URL): (1) KOORD /tickets BulkActionBar shows all 4 buttons (bulk-assign-button, bulk-status-button, bulk-priority-button, bulk-delete-button); (2) Bulk Priority dialog → select 'Tinggi' → confirm-bulk-priority → API returns ok, all 3 tickets have prioritas='Tinggi' verified via GET; (3) Bulk Delete dialog → confirm-bulk-delete disabled initially & when typing 'WRONG', enabled after exact 'HAPUS 3' → POST succeeds, all 3 tickets return 404 on subsequent GET (cascade confirmed); (4) AuditLog page renders 'Bulk Priority' and 'Bulk Delete' action labels; (5) OPERATOR has NO select-all-checkbox/bulk-action-bar on /tickets (role guard verified); (6) CreateTicket DynamicForm: selecting 'Approval Pengajuan Mutasi Guru' renders dynamic-form with form-field-* inputs; nama_sekolah='SDN 01 Bogor Tengah' and nama_operator='Budi Santoso' both prefilled AND readOnly; tanggal_sk type='date', no_whatsapp type='tel'; submit with empty required fields blocked (HTML5 native), submit with all fields filled navigates to /tickets/{id}; (7) TicketDetail shows ticket-form-data section with human-readable labels ('Nama GTK' not 'nama_gtk') and values ('Pak Ujang' visible); (8) MasterData Layanan Edit dialog shows 'Form' column on list (13 fields, 11 fields, etc per layanan); Edit → toggle-schema-editor opens schema-editor displaying all 13 schema-field-N rows with up/down arrows + delete; add-field-form has new-field-key, new-field-label, new-field-type, add-field-button all visible.

issues: Empty-required submit relies on browser HTML5 native validation (input required attribute) — the spec-mentioned 'Field wajib: {label}' toast does NOT fire because native validation blocks the submit handler first. Both behaviours block submission but UX is inconsistent with spec wording. Consider either: (a) add noValidate on form + manual toast, OR (b) document HTML5 native validation as the intended behaviour.

With 13 existing fields, the add-field-form (new-field-type Select) sits below fold inside the Dialog; clicking the type select triggers an 'outside viewport' issue on automated scroll. Real users can scroll the dialog body — purely a Playwright timing/scroll edge case, no functional bug.

action_items: (Optional UX nit) In CreateTicket, consider adding noValidate to <form> + a manual required-field toast 'Field wajib: {label}' to match spec wording. Current HTML5 native blocking is functional but silent.
(Carry-over from prior iterations) server.py is ~1615 lines — consider splitting into routers/modules (auth, tickets, layanan, kb, audit, executive).
(Hygiene) Several TEST_* tickets remain in DB from cumulative test runs. Consider an admin cleanup endpoint or DB script to purge TEST_-prefixed records.
critical_code_review_comments: BulkDeleteIn / BulkPriorityIn correctly use Field(min_length=1) → empty array returns 422. Verified.
bulk-delete cascades to db.activities, db.attachments, db.notifications using ticket_id string match — confirmed cascade via GET 404 on deleted ids.
bulk-priority skips already-target tickets (old == payload.prioritas) so updated=0 when no-op — verified.
Both endpoints emit single audit_log entry (action='bulk_delete' / 'bulk_priority') with bounded meta (ticket_numbers[:50] / ticket_ids[:50]). Good.
Per-ticket activity log 'priority_change' carries meta.bulk=true on bulk-priority — verified via GET activities.
DEFAULT_FORM_SCHEMAS seeded for 11 default layanan; existing layanan without form_schema get backfilled on startup (line 1538-1539 updates only if !existing.form_schema). Idempotent on restart. Good.
FormField pydantic Literal['text','number','date','select','textarea','tel','email'] enforces enum — invalid types would 422. Good.
DynamicForm.jsx: prefill values render readOnly+disabled with bg-zinc-50 styling — visually distinct from editable, accessible.
FormDataDisplay component fetches layanan to label-map form_data entries — labels rendered, not raw keys. Verified 'Nama GTK' shown instead of 'nama_gtk'.
BulkDeleteDialog requires exact text match 'HAPUS {N}' — destructive operation guard. Verified disabled state until exact match.
Role guard verified: operator gets 403 on bulk-delete/bulk-priority/bulk-assign/bulk-status AND UI completely hides bulk controls (select-all-checkbox + row-checkboxes + bulk-action-bar).
seed_data_creation: Tests created several TEST_P4_* and TEST_UI* tickets via operator1; bulk-delete tests cleaned up most of them. One ticket TEST_UI_DYN_FORM (TCK-2026-000053) remains for inspection. Total DB now ~26 tickets.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 fully functional. Confirmed selectors: bulk-priority-button, bulk-priority-select, confirm-bulk-priority, bulk-delete-button, bulk-delete-confirm-input (text 'HAPUS {N}' exact match required), confirm-bulk-delete, dynamic-form, form-field-{key}, ticket-form-data, toggle-schema-editor, schema-editor, schema-field-{i}, add-field-form, new-field-key, new-field-label, new-field-type, new-field-options (only when type=select), add-field-button. Frontend localStorage token key is 'dpdk_token' (NOT 'token'). Auth uses both Bearer token in localStorage AND httpOnly cookies — calling /api/auth/login with a different user via page.evaluate fetch WILL override the cookie session and switch the UI user. To isolate users in Playwright: clear_cookies() + localStorage.clear() between logins. AuditLog action labels: 'Bulk Priority', 'Bulk Delete' (in addition to prior 'Bulk Assign', 'Bulk Status'). DEFAULT_FORM_SCHEMAS dict in server.py line 95 contains seeded schemas for all 11 default layanan.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs identified. Minor UX inconsistency only: spec asks for 'Field wajib' toast on empty required submit, actual implementation relies on HTML5 native required attribute. Both block submission; spec wording mismatch only.
